basic_details.job_title: PSSSB Veterinary Inspector Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Increased - Apply Online for 310 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Subordinate Services Selection Board, Punjab (SSSB Punjab)
basic_details.department: Directorate, Animal Husbandry Department, Government of Punjab
basic_details.short_information: The Subordinate Services Selection Board, Punjab (SSSB Punjab) has re-opened the recruitment process for Veterinary Inspector (Group-C) posts under SSSB Punjab Recruitment 2026. Originally published on 24 April 2026 at sssb.punjab.gov.in, this recruitment drive now offers 310 vacancies (increased from 150) for eligible candidates. Applicants meeting the age limit prescribed under Punjab Government rules and possessing the required Veterinary/Animal Husbandry qualification as per departmental service rules can apply online through the official PSSSB career portal. Registration re-opened on June

important_dates.exam_date: To be notified on SSSB Punjab website

application_fee.details: The “Fee Details” section of the notification specifies the category-wise application fee payable by candidates and clearly mentions that the fee must be paid through online mode only. Applications without successful fee payment or with incorrect mode of payment will be treated as incomplete and shall not be accepted.

age_limit.details: The age limit for the post of Veterinary Inspector will be as per the “Age Limit” section of the advertisement and the instructions issued by the Government of Punjab from time to time. The minimum and maximum age and permissible relaxations for reserved categories will be applicable as per Punjab Government rules. The age will be calculated with reference to the last date for submission of online applications (25.05.2026).

qualification.education_qualification: As per prescribed educational/technical qualification for Veterinary Inspector (as given in the notification)
qualification.details: Before applying for Punjab SSSB Veterinary Inspector Recruitment 2026, candidates must ensure that they fulfill the prescribed educational and technical qualifications as mentioned in the official notification. The detailed qualification requirements for the Veterinary Inspector post are given under the “Educational/Technical Qualification” section of the advertisement as per the departmental service rules of the Animal Husbandry Department. | Nationality: Indian citizen eligible as per Government of Punjab rules. | Veterinary Inspector

salary_details.pay_scale: As per Punjab Government pay scale for Group-C Veterinary Inspector (see pay scale section in notification)
salary_details.pay scale: As per Punjab Government Group-C pay scale for Veterinary Inspector (refer notification)
salary_details.allowances: Dearness, HRA and other allowances as admissible under Punjab Government rules
salary_details.details: The pay scale and allowances for the post of Veterinary Inspector will be as per the approved pay matrix and rules of the Government of Punjab for Group-C posts. Detailed information regarding pay scale and admissible allowances is provided under the “Pay Scale and Allowances” section of the advertisement.

selection_process: 1. Written Examination Objective type written test as per syllabus and exam pattern notified by SSSB Punjab
2. Document Verification Verification of original certificates and documents of shortlisted candidates
3. Final Merit List Prepared on the basis of written exam marks and reservation norms

The selection procedure for Punjab SSSB Veterinary Inspector under Advertisement No. 10 of 2026 will consist of a written examination and subsequent stages as mentioned in the “Selection Method / Examination Information” section of the notification. The merit list will be prepared based on the marks obtained in the written examination and applicable reservation policy.
The notification also specifies detailed conditions under which a candidate may be declared ineligible or his/her candidature cancelled
or non-fulfilment of eligibility criteria. SSSB Punjab reserves the right to modify or cancel the recruitment process and to increase or decrease the number of vacancies at any stage.
how_to_apply: The application process for Punjab SSSB Veterinary Inspector Recruitment 2026 is completely online through the official website of SSSB Punjab. Applications submitted through any mode other than the online portal will not be accepted under any circumstances.

Candidates must first complete a one-time registration to generate a User ID (Email ID) and Password, and then log in to fill the online application form. They must enter personal, educational and category details correctly, upload their passport-size photograph and signature, and upload scanned copies of required documents in PDF format before proceeding to fee payment.
Visit the official SSSB Punjab website: https://sssb.punjab.gov.in and click on the “Apply Online” link.
For new users, click on “Registration” and fill in the required details to generate User ID (Email ID) and Password.
After successful registration, log in using your User ID (Email ID) and Password to access the online application form.
Fill in personal, educational and category details carefully and upload a recent passport size photograph and scanned signature.
Click on “Attach Annexure” and upload scanned copies of Matric (10th) certificate, educational qualification certificates and other mandatory documents in PDF format.
Click on “Make Payment” and pay the application fee online as per your category.
After successful fee payment, click on “Submit” to complete the application process and download/print the submitted application form for future reference.
important_instructions: Fill the online form strictly as per your correct category and category code; category and category code cannot be changed after final submission. Candidates will be solely responsible for any mistake made while filling the online form; once submitted, the data cannot be edited. Scan and upload all required certificates (Matric/10th, educational qualification and other relevant documents) in PDF format only as per the portal instructions. No fee exemption or concession is admissible; non-payment of application fee will render the application incomplete and liable to rejection. If the online fee transaction fails for any reason and the application is not submitted, the fee once paid will be non-refundable. Applications submitted and fees paid through any mode other than the prescribed online method will not be accepted and such applications will be rejected. SSSB Punjab reserves the right to increase or decrease the number of vacancies, withdraw the requisition or cancel the advertisement at any stage of the recruitment process; such decisions will be binding on all candidates.

faq.question: Q1. What is Punjab SSSB Veterinary Inspector Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Punjab SSSB Veterinary Inspector Recruitment 2026 is a state‑level recruitment drive by Subordinate Services Selection Board (SSSB/PSSSB) to fill 310 Group‑C Veterinary Inspector posts in the Animal Husbandry Department, Government of Punjab, under Advertisement No. 10 of 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there for Punjab Veterinary Inspector 2026?
faq.answer: The official short notification has announced 310 vacancies for the post of Veterinary Inspector in the Animal Husbandry Department, Punjab. These posts are further divided category‑wise with separate reservation for women candidates as per Punjab Government rules.

faq.question: Q3. What are the important dates for Punjab Veterinary Inspector Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The public notice/short notification was issued in April 2026 and the online application window will remain open from 06 June 2026 to 19 June 2026 at the SSSB Punjab website. The detailed notification and exam date are to be published separately on the official portal.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility and educational qualification for Punjab Veterinary Inspector 2026?
faq.answer: As per the notice and previous recruitment pattern, candidates must have 10+2 with Science (Physics, Chemistry and Biology/Maths) and a Diploma in Veterinary Science & Animal Health Technology (or equivalent) from a recognised institution to be eligible for Veterinary Inspector. The detailed educational/technical qualifications are given in the “Educational/Technical Qualifications” section of the 2026 notification and should be checked before applying.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for Punjab SSSB Veterinary Inspector Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: For Punjab Veterinary Inspector 2026, the age limit for general category candidates is expected to be 18 to 37 years as on 01 January 2026, in line with the standard PSSSB Veterinary Inspector eligibility norms. Upper age relaxation for SC, BC, Government employees, Ex‑Servicemen, PwD and widows/divorcees is applicable as per Punjab Government instructions and will be detailed in the full notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the pay scale for Veterinary Inspector in Punjab under this recruitment?
faq.answer: Past PSSSB notifications have offered a basic pay around the Punjab Group‑C pay matrix (earlier ₹29,200 per month) for Veterinary Inspector, and the 2026 detailed advertisement will specify the exact pay scale and allowances. Candidates will also be entitled to dearness allowance, HRA and other benefits as per Punjab Government rules applicable to Group‑C posts.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for Punjab Veterinary Inspector Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The short notice confirms that category‑wise online application fees will be charged, and earlier recruitments have followed a pattern of higher fee for General, lower fee for SC/BC/EWS and nominal fee for Ex‑Servicemen and PwD candidates. The exact fee structure for 2026 will be given in the “Fee Details” section of the detailed notification and must be paid online only; applications without successful fee payment will be treated as incomplete.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for Punjab SSSB Veterinary Inspector 2026?
faq.answer: Selection will be based on an objective‑type written examination followed by document verification, and the final merit list will be prepared solely on the basis of marks obtained in the written exam, subject to reservation norms. There is no mention of an interview stage in the short notice; detailed selection procedure and disqualification conditions will be provided in the full advertisement.
